docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE COURT'S INSTRUCTIONS ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 8/15/16. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PLAINTIFF PAMELA KELLEY OR DEFENDANT BOB EVANS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, ROBERT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY KELLEY, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-15-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-11-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-19-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PAMELA KELLEY & DEFENDANT ROBERT EVANS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THE MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLEY, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, ROBERT
